text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Trainer! Have you seen 
my beloved Josephine?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Rarely do I ever let her leave my side, 
but it seems she's managed to abscond 
off somewhere…

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Ah, I speak, of course, of my beloved 
hand mirror. Oh, how she cries when she 
is on her own.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But she needn't fear for long, for I am 
on my way! Wait for me, Josephiiine!!!
